Refer to the endpoint template instructions in `.github/instructions/endpoint_template.instructions.md` for creating new API endpoints with consistent structure.

When asked to format SQL code, always refer to the SQL formatting instructions in `.github/instructions/sql.instructions.md` and follow the rules specified there.

When commit messages are required, refer to the commit message guidelines in `.github/instructions/commit_messages.instructions.md` and ensure that all commit messages follow the specified format and conventions.
